---
title: "About"
---

Hi, I'm Ishaat Chowdhury — a software developer based in Canada.

This is my personal dev blog where I write about tools, workflows, and projects that I find interesting.

## Tech Stack

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), hosted on [Cloudflare Pages](https://pages.cloudflare.com/), and the source code is on [GitHub](https://github.com/ishchow/personal-site).

## License

- **Content**: [CC BY-NC-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)
- **Source code**: [MIT](https://github.com/ishchow/personal-site/blob/main/LICENSE.md)

## Links

- [GitHub](https://www.github.com/ishchow)
- [LinkedIn](https://ca.linkedin.com/in/ishaatc)
